message:
Fix model ID and depth validation bugs

- Update Anthropic model ID for best/good tiers from claude-sonnet-4-5-20250514
  (which doesn't exist) to claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929
- Fix depth validation: max_depth=0 means "leaf agent, no sub-spawning" and
  should not prevent instantiation. Only enforce depth < max_depth when max_depth > 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
